## ESTRUTURA

| Módulo | Nome | Conteúdo Principal |
|--------|------|-------------------|
| 01 | Course Introduction | Welcome, portal navigation, membership |
| 02 | Facebook Ads Basic | How FB ads work, auction model, funnels, copy framework |
| 03 | Launching | Rapid Fire Testing (3 rounds), campaign setup |
| 04 | Advanced Facebook Ads | Algorithm, OCPM/CPM, data interpretation, estimating results |
| 05 | Messenger Bots & Manychat | Bot funnels, automation |
| 06 | Lead Gen Framework & SOP | TOF-MOF-BOF, retargeting stacks, campaign structure |
| 07 | eCom Framework & SOP | MVF, 4 funnel types, scaling, optimization |
| 08 | Coaches/Online Courses Framework | High-ticket funnels, webinar registration |
| 09 | Nuggets of Wisdom | Guest speakers: Phil Kiel, Akbar Sheikh, Curt Maly, Madis Birk, etc. |

## ELEMENTOS POR CAMADA

| Camada | Count | Highlights |
|--------|-------|-----------|
| L1 Philosophies | 17 | Data over feelings, test before build, creative is new targeting |
| L2 Mental Models | 14 | BEAR algorithm, funnel temperature, bottleneck diagnosis, H vs V scaling |
| L3 Heuristics | 41 | 1% cold CTR, 50 conv/week, $200-500 RFT, 3x ROAS, 68% cart abandonment |
| L4 Frameworks | 16 | RFT 3-round, 6-Step Copy, TOF-MOF-BOF, retarget stacks, 4 eCom funnels |
